summary: Generate mode: Tested new wallet sync endpoints (/api/wallet/status, /api/wallet/can-trade, /api/wallet/sync). Created 14 backend tests (all passing) and 14 frontend E2E tests (all passing). Total 113 backend tests passed, 26+ frontend tests passed across wallet-sync and core-flows specs.

endpoints_verified.POST /api/wallet/disconnect: PASS - Clears wallet state, returns status=disconnected

features_verified.wallet_sync_flow: PASS - Complete connect -> sync -> check status -> disconnect flow works
features_verified.dashboard_wallet_display: PASS - Dashboard displays wallet balance card and stats
features_verified.frontend_backend_integration: PASS - Frontend uses backend wallet status instead of direct RPC calls

context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet sync feature fully tested. New endpoints /api/wallet/status, /api/wallet/can-trade, and /api/wallet/sync are working correctly. Frontend WalletPanel.jsx and Dashboard.jsx now use backend wallet status endpoint for balance display instead of direct RPC calls. The wallet sync flow is: connect wallet -> POST /api/wallet/sync -> GET /api/wallet/status for updates -> POST /api/wallet/disconnect when disconnecting.
